variants: Haruma Senoue hails from the Willowfell Outskirts, where he spent his formative years. He currently lives in the Copperbee Range, enjoying the serene beauty of the mountains. A notable accomplishment in his career was receiving the Rising Sable Seal, a recognition he earned for his innovative work. Haruma is also the author of the Maplecrest Synthesis Tablet, a device that has made significant strides in his field. Additionally, he is an active member of the Umbraquartz Mariner's Club, where he shares his passion for maritime activities.

Born in Willowfell Outskirts, Haruma Senoue has always had a penchant for exploration and innovation. Today, he resides in the picturesque Copperbee Range, which provides him with ample inspiration for his projects. Recently, he was honored with the Rising Sable Seal in recognition of his contributions to technology. As the inventor of the Maplecrest Synthesis Tablet, Haruma has left a lasting mark on his industry. He is also affiliated with the Umbraquartz Mariner's Club, reinforcing his love for the ocean and adventuring.
